executives.name: Satya Nadella
executives.background: Satya Nadella is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Microsoft. Before being named CEO in February 2014, Nadella held leadership roles in both enterprise and consumer businesses across the company. Joining Microsoft in 1992, he quickly became known as a leader who could span a breadth of technologies and businesses to transform some of Microsoft’s biggest product offerings.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Director

executives.name: Amy Hood
executives.background: Amy Hood is Microsoft’s executive vice president and chief financial officer. She is responsible for leading the company’s worldwide finance organization, including acquisitions, treasury activities, tax planning, accounting and reporting, and internal audit and investor relations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Bradford Smith
executives.background: Brad Smith is Microsoft’s vice chair and president. He leads a team of more than 1,500 business, legal and corporate affairs professionals located in 54 countries and operating in more than 120 nations.

executives.name: Judson Althoff
executives.background: Judson Althoff is executive vice president and chief commercial officer at Microsoft. He is responsible for the sales strategy, execution and revenue growth of the company’s commercial business, which spans enterprise, public sector, small and medium businesses, services, and developer and partner communities.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Christopher Capossela
executives.background: Chris Capossela is executive vice president and chief marketing officer at Microsoft. He leads the company’s worldwide marketing and consumer business, which includes advertising, brand, communications, research as well as Microsoft’s retail stores.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer

executives.name: Bobby Yerramilli-Rao
executives.background: Chief Strategy Officer and Corporate Vice President at Microsoft. He joined the board in 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Strategy Officer and Corporate Vice President, Corporate Strategy

executives.name: Brad Smith
executives.background: President of Marshall University and former Chairman and CEO of Intuit Inc.

executives.name: Carlos Rodriguez
executives.background: Executive Chair of ADP, Inc. Former CEO of ADP.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Catherine MacGregor
executives.background: CEO of Engie S.A.

executives.name: Cesar Cernuda
executives.background: Cesar Cernuda has served as our President since July 2020. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Cernuda spent 23 years at Microsoft Corporation, where he most recently served as Corporate Vice President, Microsoft Corporation and President, Microsoft Latin America.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President / President of Microsoft Latin America / President of Microsoft Asia Pacific

executives.name: Charles Scharf
executives.background: CEO and President of Wells Fargo & Company.

executives.name: Christian Kleinerman
executives.background: Christian Kleinerman has served as our Executive Vice President, Product Management since April 2024, and previously served as our Senior Vice President, Product Management since 2017. Prior to joining Snowflake, he held various product management roles at Google and Microsoft.

executives.name: Colette Kress
executives.background: Colette M. Kress joined NVIDIA in 2013 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to NVIDIA, Ms. Kress served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the Business Software and Services division of Cisco Systems, Inc. from 2010 to 2013. She also spent 13 years at Microsoft Corporation in various finance roles, including Chief Financial Officer of the Server and Tools division. Ms. Kress holds a B.S. degree in Finance from the University of Arizona and an M.B.A. degree from the University of Washington.

tenure_dates.title: CFO, Server & Tools Business; Senior roles in corporate planning and finance

executives.name: Dana Rao
executives.background: Mr. Rao has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Trust Officer since June 2018. He joined Adobe in 2012.

tenure_dates.title: Associate General Counsel (Intellectual Property and Licensing)

executives.name: Dev Stahlkopf
executives.background: Dev Stahlkopf is Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer. She joined Cisco in 2021 from Microsoft, where she was Corporate Vice President and General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President, General Counsel (various legal leadership roles)

executives.name: Emma Walmsley
executives.background: CEO of GSK plc.

executives.name: Harvinder Bhela
executives.background: Harvinder S. Bhela has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Product Officer since January 2022. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Bhela spent 24 years at Microsoft Corporation, where he most recently served as Corporate Vice President of the Microsoft 365 Security, Compliance and Management business.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President, Microsoft 365 Security, Compliance and Management (and various prior leadership roles)

executives.name: Hugh Johnston
executives.background: Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of The Walt Disney Company. Former Vice Chairman and CFO of PepsiCo.

executives.name: John Stanton
executives.background: Chairman of Trilogy Search Partners. Former Chairman and CEO of Western Wireless.

executives.name: Kevin Johnson
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Starbucks Corporation.

executives.name: Kirk Koenigsbauer
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer and Corporate Vice President of Microsoft's Experiences and Devices Group.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer & Corporate Vice President, Experiences and Devices Group

executives.name: Mason Morfit
executives.background: CEO and Co-Chief Investment Officer of ValueAct Capital. He joined the board in 2023.

executives.name: Muhammad Alam
executives.background: Muhammad Alam is a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE, leading SAP Product Engineering. He joined SAP in 2022 from Microsoft.

executives.name: Patricia Stonesifer
executives.background: Former CEO of Martha's Table and former CEO of the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation.

executives.name: Penny Pritzker
executives.background: Founder and Chairman of PSP Partners. Former U.S. Secretary of Commerce.

executives.name: Rani Borkar
executives.background: Rani Borkar is Corporate Vice President, Azure Hardware Systems and Infrastructure at Microsoft Corporation. She previously held leadership roles at Intel and IBM.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President, Azure Hardware Systems and Infrastructure

executives.name: Reid Hoffman
executives.background: Partner at Greylock Partners. Co-founder of LinkedIn.

executives.name: Sandra Peterson
executives.background: Operating Partner at Clayton, Dubilier & Rice. Former Group Worldwide Chairman of Johnson & Johnson.

executives.name: Stephen Luczo
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Seagate Technology.

executives.name: Teri List
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Gap Inc.
